habe70498gc1f2g4b57g839eg47daa091e8cf: Our Queen came to me again. Another dream, another promise.
h838f318ag81f1g4e2dga236gc684bf0e7b54: My Queen came to me again. Another dream, another promise.
hace21da4g4713g46bcg9a04gfd0476cf151d: An entire army, standing at my command.
h6e82db93g26ddg450dg926bg1ab4eb4e1a6a: It is a lie, born of this festering parasite. It must be.
h8aabcec7g8096g4721ga277gdfaabae0624a: But I want it. The blood, the power - all of it.
h7c1ddee4g2525g4bd9g855fgcddd70b459f7: These are more than just dreams. They're premonitions.
h384eabfeg4d82g4e0eg9b19gb4bd8bb2edaf: I... no. I cannot allow myself to believe it.
h22c3000cg8b50g448egacb5g68a184447efe: I know my destiny, as sure as I know my crèche circles this world.
h4e0ba336g2b1eg48dagb0bbgd2bbdfe0ca19: Yet... why does my body still tremble? How can a lie shine like truth?
ha93742fag7eefg41cag9eb8g031eedbe4a12: I wish I had an answer for you.
h3d129381gcff0g43f7g9d45g3b59bf606299: Urgh. I do not like this... uncertainty. Neither mine, nor yours.
hdb01a0d0gd9d7g4fe4ga18cgbc3debe1cd74: We must seize our fates and make the realm ours!
h83767eacga551g4e19g8547g11cfedefcf72: Have you forgotten your own warning? You can't give in to temptation.
he9dd0dbeg6d03g4888g8bcdgc2661a320fc7: Yes. I was... I was weak. I've faltered in my duty.
h966251a8g2c5ag45d9gab9dg8788616f3905: I know my destiny, as sure as I know my crèche circles this world.
hc04f0e84g353dg449cg96fag00af93b390cc: Yet... why does my body still tremble? How can a lie shine like truth?
h7e0997a8ge73eg4f15ga88bgb4f63fba00d4: Calm yourself. Whatever this is, we'll face it together.
h1ceed395g9874g493agaa13g75de19848d2b: Bah. I am not a hatchling, and you won't speak to me like one.
hb12836cag6ac1g49c1ga3eag1bc2fbdbca2e: I hear you had dreams too? The brain-bugs got busy last night. And I've got a theory.
h652e199cgd0c9g422fgb0f8g63b774ee6883: When you call on the tadpole to influence others, we pay the price that very night. All of us.
h7b87b321g69eag44cdgb6a8gcd96dffe08fb: You speak truth. Calling on the parasite summons our own misery. It ends now.
h8d9584b5g908dg420bg8ba2g340168f680f2: Agreed - enough with the mind-twiddling. I'm not keen on travelling wherever these dreams lead us.
h024eede3gd4f1g4206gba6fgec916b708d8a: We should avoid using the parasite. It can only mean trouble.
h1249013ege18dg4400gbdbcga8da286d94f3: Then our dream-torment ends, if you do not sever your promise. Such would be the act of a fool.
h68113993g0d04g4744g8017g1233ada657a4: And I do not care for fools.
h2d7167c4g34deg4fe2ga954g2131f18db4db: The parasite is useful. Let's not be afraid of turning that to our advantage.
hccf4c236gdf74g4bedg9e62g4866abf703dd: Shka'keth! Then you will force us to suffer.
h0f0636b6g1f01g4952g85a8g0da064f684ca: I said they were connected, I didn't say we should stop. Let's not throw away that power over some dreams.
h41b181dfg22f4g4b4eg83cegd6c3eb4d0f64: |Karlach: Yeah, we need to stop. Who knows what these visions might bring?|
hf2f70730g7856g43e4g9d77g794438275f65: Agreed. The power to bend wills is a mind flayer specialty. We're the ones who are truly at risk.
ha4c434b5g0553g4005ga47age19c071bb83f: We can make do. There's plenty of ways to manipulate someone without resorting to that.
h12d9f65agfeb8g4dc8g9023g77b9ee69e4d9: I couldn't help but eavesdrop on you. It seems we all had interesting dreams.
hfac5c39cge76bg42d4g81c5gb6e28ce581d8: Since we started using our condition to influence others, I've been hearing things at night. And now these dreams? They have to be connected.
h1c3e3144g2b56g4eeagb4fdg18890f0bf262: |It's caused by using the tadpole to steer minds.|
hd9e99c83g01b8g49bag9e72g83952f9e8151: Those nightmarish visions of yours, Lae'zel, they aren't dreams - they're projections. Illithid ones.
h10ff9896gf292g40c0gb6f9g2169ba7fd1a0: The tadpoles give us the power to bend others' wills, but using that power clearly comes at a price. Are we willing to pay it?
hcd1d384fg6831g4f4eg97d1g286e62a1660d: |It's caused by using the tadpole to steer minds.|
he79684acg8029g4681g8927g76bda7e51e44: |It's caused by using the tadpole to steer minds.|
h0ffe60d6g6b4dg4deeg8f5eg0be33b3f5da7: I think I can guess what you two are talking about - the dreams, yes? The visitor?
h8d6be1ccg59b3g45eegba34ga2bd3e3a17c7: This began when we started using our infection to influence the minds of others. I don't think that's a coincidence.
hd2c6822eg96cfg44bcg9e23g934ff07697a0: Has it escaped you that exploiting the tadpole conjures these visions for us?
hb120c7cegcef0g4b58ga563gf026a9ebbe34: Calling on it to read minds summons our own misery. It ends now.
hcd94a288g6a3bg470ag950cgd26ad3fac105: Focus, Lae'zel. You will reject the dream, and we will be purified.
h495344f6g95a2g4f1dgaaf7g746f4e373288: Focus, Lae'zel. We just need to find this cure of yours.
heda39ad8g8f53g4bd5g8a25g4de0743bf5ba: Vlaakith'ka sivim hrath krash'ht - only in Vlaakith may we find light!
h1011dc2cg301cg456bg9464gb0a3dffe8869: Let the ghaik speak. I will carry their heads by the hundreds to Vlaakith's throne, if I must!
h2b5567e5g4474g4e78g8d66g5fda19a6b065: Tricks of the mind, that's all. Don't give in to them.
ha6f8efeeg68a5g49c7g9bc6g7d2da2acc812: Embrace the dream. We will conquer the realm - and all that lies beneath it.
h3df57fd1g5824g4cebg97f1g09e268b69dc1: We could just embrace the dream - conquer the whole realm.
hbd0f388cg230bg4cbeg93e5ga727d3f30cb2: Yes. I will be Vlaakith's light. The very planes will shift on my word. I...
hd88de08dga585g4f04gb833gcdb2a47444f7: ... no! I will not be ensnared by the ghaik!
h4d21b9c2gddfdg42a3gb472g83b97f392e42: I underestimated their lure. I must meditate further on the matter.
h315726b6gf510g4c4dg9ce8ge248ebc1c3b4: Enough. This vision is not Vlaakith.
